visual_summary: A massive, level desiccated sea bed characterized by a vast barren basin and a sense of desolate, ancient emptiness. The landscape is anchored by a solar-ray hatching enclosure and subterranean egg vaults, with the scale defined by the distance between the incubator and the surrounding wasteland. The area contains two hundred decorated military chariots and enormous beasts of burden.
layout_notes: A flat, expansive basin containing a central incubator/hatching enclosure and subterranean vaults; massive scale relative to surrounding wasteland.
lighting: Harsh, direct solar illumination with high-contrast shadows across the flat basin.
constraints: Must maintain a sense of massive scale via distance and object placement.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural details of the "subterranean egg vaults" are not defined.
The exact nature of the "solar-ray hatching enclosure" mechanism is unstated.
